team.date_founded: One of the oldest and grandest charters of the outer worlds, founded in the storm-cities of Jupiter at the dawn of gas-giant football.
team.number_of_fans: Around 60 million — a colossal, demanding following spread across the Jovian moons.
team.badge: A clenched titan's fist wreathed in storm-cloud, the Great Red Spot raging behind it.
team.home_kit: Burnt orange and storm-grey with a swirling tempest pattern across the chest.
team.away_kit: Deep charcoal with orange lightning forking down the sides.
team.third_kit: Cream and rust, evoking the planet's banded clouds.
team.history: Jupiter Titans are the great power of the gas-giant game — vast, wealthy, and physically overwhelming. Built on raw strength and a fearsome defensive line, they bully opponents into submission and expect to win every trophy in sight. Loved on Jupiter, feared and envied everywhere else.
team.club_culture: Powerful, entitled, and ruthlessly winning. The Storm believe dominance is their birthright.
team.political_leaning: Jovian establishment superpower — the club of the outer system's old money and political muscle.
trophy_cabinet: A vast haul of league titles and cups
The most decorated club of the gas giants
legends: Atlas Vorn — the colossal defender who reportedly went a full season without being dribbled past
achievements: Most trophies of any outer-system club
Record for fewest goals conceded in a season

stadium.date_built: A legendary storm-sealed arena, one of the grandest venues in the system.
stadium.sponsors: Bankrolled by the Jovian energy conglomerates and storm-harvest combines.
stadium.pitch_size: Full size, immaculate, built to showcase the Titans' physical command.
stadium.pitch_type: Pristine managed turf, flawless and fast.
stadium.bio: Storm Arena — The Red Spot — is a cauldron of sixty thousand storm-fans, a towering, intimidating fortress where the Titans rarely lose. The roar when they win the ball is said to register on the colony's weather sensors.

training_facility.date_built: An elite, sprawling campus, the best-funded in the gas giants.
training_facility.sponsors: Lavishly backed by the club's energy-conglomerate owners.
training_facility.bio: The Storm Belt Athletic Campus is a temple to physical dominance, drilling power, conditioning, and the suffocating defensive structure that defines the Titans. It produces giants.

manager.appearance: Broad, imposing, and severe, with the heavy frame of a man bred for high gravity.
manager.bio: Titan Krell is a winner and a bully in equal measure — an aggressive, physical coach who demands total dominance and accepts nothing less than trophies. His sides overpower opponents and grind out the rest.
manager.playing_history: A monstrous defensive midfielder feared across the outer leagues.
manager.playing_philosophy: Dominate the physical battle and the football takes care of itself. Be aggressive, be solid, and never, ever lose at home.
manager.culture: The iron-fisted custodian of the outer system's grandest club.
achievements: A long list of major trophies as player and manager

managing_staff.appearance: Sharp-suited and intense, the cold tactical mind beside Krell's bluster.
managing_staff.bio: Kael Borren designs the high-pressure traps that turn the Titans' aggression into control, the strategist who keeps all that power organised.
managing_staff.playing_history: A tactically astute midfielder turned analyst-coach.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Power without structure is just noise. Aim the aggression and it becomes unstoppable.
achievements: Architect of the league's most feared pressing structure

players.appearance: Vast and commanding, dominates his area in the heavy gravity.
players.bio: Storm Reyes is the balanced, imperious keeper behind the Titans' fearsome line, an immovable last word in any siege.
achievements: Most clean sheets among outer-system keepers

players.appearance: Broad and tireless, an overlapping powerhouse.
players.bio: Cyclone Walsh is the workhorse full-back who grafts both ways for ninety minutes, the relentless edge of the Storm's defence.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Immovable and team-minded, the heart of the fearsome line.
players.bio: Thunder Okafor is the selfless colossus who marshals the Titans' famous defence, the calm authority at its core.

players.appearance: Bullish and ferocious, attacks every duel.
players.bio: Lightning Petrov is the aggressive enforcer who makes forwards regret entering the Titans' half, the snarl in the line.
achievements: Most duels won in the league

players.appearance: Vast and balanced, the reader of the back line.
players.bio: Gale Fischer is the composed defender who organises the giants, snuffing danger before it forms.

players.appearance: Sharp and inventive, the craft amid the power.
players.bio: Vortex Chen is the creative spark who turns the Titans' dominance into goals, the rare artist in a side of bruisers.
achievements: Most chances created in the squad

players.appearance: Willing and powerful, the engine of the midfield.
players.bio: Squall Morales is the selfless midfield workhorse who wins the ball and feeds the artists, the lungs of the Storm.

players.appearance: Balanced and strong, the controlling pivot.
players.bio: Gust Nakamura is the composed midfielder who dictates the tempo from deep, keeping the Titans' power purposeful.
achievements: Highest pass volume in the side

players.appearance: Towering and predatory, a complete modern striker.
players.bio: Tempest Rivera is the selfish, devastating spearhead who finishes everything the Titans' dominance creates, the jewel of the attack.

players.appearance: Direct and ferocious, the storm up front.
players.bio: Typhoon Lee is the aggressive forward who batters back lines alongside Rivera, all power and menace.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and explosive, the wide weapon.
players.bio: Maelstrom Park is the selfish wide forward who turns dominance into chaos, hungry to add to the Titans' goal glut.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Zephyr Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, a dependable understudy at a club that expects perfection.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Mist Tanaka is the team-first deputy who maintains the fearsome line's standards when the starters rest.

players.appearance: Young and vast, an academy giant in the making.
players.bio: Nimbus Kim is the balanced young defender being moulded into the next Titan colossus, all power and promise.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Breeze Brennan is the creative deputy who offers a different gear from the bench, a youngster of real promise.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a star's swagger.
players.bio: Rush Sato is the gifted young forward the Storm are grooming behind Rivera — selfish, confident, and impatient for his moment.
